---
title: "lecture Mitral PTMV"
author: "謝慕揚 MD, PhD, FESC"
date: 2026-03-27
lang: zh-TW
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

titlepage


{\bfseriesemergency_red Mitral Stenosis   
[0.5cm] Structural Heart Disease Intervention}


{emergency_blue 二尖瓣狹窄結構性心臟病介入治療}


{\bfseries 經皮穿刺二尖瓣球囊擴張術}

{Percutaneous Transvenous Mitral Commissurotomy (PTMC)}


{內容包含：}


- 二尖瓣狹窄的診斷：心臟超音波與心導管
- 經皮穿刺二尖瓣交連切開術治療準備流程與細節
- 洪瑞松醫師(Jui-Sung Hung, MD)相關文獻回顧
- Inoue氣球大小計算與逐步擴張技術
- 導管流程與技術面向


{編輯日期：\mydate}

\vfill

{謝慕揚, MD, PhD, FESC}

titlepage

\tableofcontents

---


## 前言與歷史背景


### 二尖瓣狹窄流行病學


風濕性心臟病(Rheumatic Heart Disease)至今仍是開發中國家重要的心血管疾病，其中二尖瓣狹窄(Mitral Stenosis, MS)是最常見的表現。自1984年Inoue等人首次報告使用單一乳膠氣球導管進行經皮穿刺二尖瓣交連切開術(Percutaneous Transvenous Mitral Commissurotomy, PTMC)以來，此技術已成為適合病患的首選治療方式。


### PTMC發展歷程


| p{12cm}}  **年份** | **發展里程碑** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **年份** | **發展里程碑** |  |
| 1959 | Cope與Ross分別發展出經房間隔穿刺技術(Transseptal catheterization) |  |
| 1984 | Inoue等人首次報告使用Inoue balloon進行PTMC |  |
| 1987-1991 | 全球開始大規模使用，超過3,000例於日本202家醫院執行 |  |
| 1992 | 洪瑞松醫師發表經房間隔穿刺技術詳細指引 |  |
| 1994 | 發表以身高為基礎的氣球大小選擇公式 |  |
| 1996 | 發表PTMC常見陷阱與技巧(Pitfalls and Tips) |  |
| 至今 | 全球已執行超過15,000例Inoue balloon PTMC |  |


## 二尖瓣狹窄的診斷


### 臨床表現


二尖瓣狹窄病患典型症狀包括：

- 呼吸困難(Dyspnea)，尤其是運動時
- 端坐呼吸(Orthopnea)與夜間陣發性呼吸困難
- 心悸，常合併心房顫動(Atrial fibrillation)
- 咳血(Hemoptysis)
- 全身性栓塞事件
- 右心衰竭表現：下肢水腫、腹水


### 心臟超音波評估


#### 二維超音波(2D Echocardiography)


二維心臟超音波是評估二尖瓣狹窄的主要工具，可評估：


| p{10.5cm}}  **評估項目** | **內容說明** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **評估項目** | **內容說明** |  |
| 瓣膜面積測量 | Planimetry為評估MS嚴重度的參考方法，於parasternal short-axis view進行 |  |
| 瓣葉型態 | 評估瓣葉活動度、厚度、鈣化程度 |  |
| 瓣下結構 | 評估chordae tendineae增厚與縮短程度 |  |
| 左心房大小 | 常見左心房擴大，需排除血栓 |  |
| 肺動脈壓力 | 使用tricuspid regurgitation velocity估算 |  |
| 合併病灶 | 評估mitral regurgitation及其他瓣膜病變 |  |


figure
    
    [Image]
    Multiplanar Reconstruction (MPR) Method During Offline Analysis of a 3D Dataset for a Rheumatic Mitral Stenosis. A,B, Two orthogonal image planes perpendicular to the mitral valve were manually aligned across the middle of the MV. C, Short-­axis view at the level of the MV orifice and the narrowest mitral valve area was obtained and measured manually by direct planimetry. D, En-­face view of mitral valve by three-­dimensional transesophageal echocardiography (3D TEE) in surgical view. AO = aorta; AV = aortic valve; LA = left atrium; LV = left ventricle; MV = mitral valve. Reference: Echocardiography 2018 Vol. 35 Issue 10 Pages 1621-1625. 
    


figure
    
    [Image]
    Steady-­state Free Precession (SSFP) Cine Short-­axis Image of the Stenotic Mitral Valve. The narrowest area of mitral valve was measured by free hand drawing. LV = left ventricle; RV = right ventricle. Reference: Echocardiography 2018 Vol. 35 Issue 10 Pages 1621-1625. 
    


#### 二尖瓣開口面積嚴重度分級


| p{4cm}p{4cm}}  **嚴重度** | **瓣膜面積 (cm$^2$)** | **Mean Gradient (mmHg)** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **嚴重度** | **瓣膜面積 (cm$^2$)** | **Mean Gradient (mmHg)** |
| 輕度(Mild) | $>$ 1.5 | $<$ 5 |
| 中度(Moderate) | 1.0--1.5 | 5--10 |
| 重度(Severe) | $<$ 1.0 | $>$ 10 |


#### Wilkins Score評分系統


Wilkins score是最廣泛使用的心臟超音波評分系統，用以評估瓣膜型態是否適合PTMC。評分範圍為4-16分，分數越低預後越佳。


| p{3.5cm}p{3.5cm}p{3cm}p{3cm}}  **Grade** | **Mobility** | **Thickening** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Grade** | **Mobility** | **Thickening** |
| 1 | Highly mobile with only leaflet tips restricted | Leaflets near normal (4--5 mm) |
| 2 | Leaflet mid and base portions have normal mobility | Midleaflets normal, considerable thickening of margins (5--8 mm) |
| 3 | Valve continues to move forward in diastole, mainly from the base | Thickening extending through entire leaflets (5--8 mm) |
| 4 | No or minimal forward movement of leaflets in diastole | Considerable thickening of all leaflet tissue ($>$ 8--10 mm) |


**Wilkins Score臨床應用：**

- Score $\leq$ 8：適合PTMC的最佳候選者
- Score 9--11：灰色地帶，需個別化評估
- Score $>$ 11：較不適合PTMC，成功率較低


#### 新型評分系統(Nunes Score)


2014年Nunes等人發表新的定量評分系統，包含更多量化參數：


| p{3cm}p{6.5cm}}  **參數** | **分數** | **說明** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **參數** | **分數** | **說明** |
| MVA $\leq$ 1 cm$^2$ | 2分 | 基線瓣膜面積 |
| Maximum leaflet displacement $\leq$ 12 mm | 3分 | 瓣葉最大位移(doming height) |
| Commissural area ratio $\geq$ 1.25 | 3分 | 交連區域不對稱性 |
| Subvalvular thickening | 3分 | 瓣下結構增厚 |
| *風險分層：低風險(0-3分)、中風險(5分)、高風險(6-11分)* |  |  |


figure
    
    [Image]
    Echocardiographic parasternal short-axis view showing 2 traced areas to calculate the commissural area ratio. Asymmetry of commissural thickening was quantified by the ratio between the largest to the smallest area. Reference: Circulation 2014 Vol. 129 Issue 8 Pages 886-95. 
    


figure
    
    [Image]
    Echocardiographic apical 4-chamber view showing maximum apical displacement of the leaflets relative to the mitral annulus. LA indicates left atrium; LV, left ventricle; RA, right atrium; and RV, right ventricle. Reference: Circulation 2014 Vol. 129 Issue 8 Pages 886-95.  
    


### 心導管檢查


#### 血行動力學評估


心導管檢查可精確測量：

- 左心房壓力(Left atrial pressure)
- 左心室壓力(Left ventricular pressure)
- 跨瓣膜壓力差(Transmitral gradient)
- 肺動脈壓力(Pulmonary artery pressure)
- 心輸出量(Cardiac output)
- 使用Gorlin formula計算瓣膜面積


#### Gorlin Formula


二尖瓣面積計算公式：

equation
MVA = CO / (DFP \times HR){31 \times \Delta P}
equation

其中：

- MVA = Mitral valve area (cm$^2$)
- CO = Cardiac output (mL/min)
- DFP = Diastolic filling period (sec/beat)
- HR = Heart rate (beats/min)
- $\Delta P$ = Mean diastolic pressure gradient (mmHg)
- 31 = Empirical constant


#### 左心室造影


Left ventriculography用於評估：

- Mitral regurgitation嚴重度(Sellers classification)
- 左心室功能
- 作為transseptal puncture的解剖標記參考


## PTMC病患選擇與準備


### 適應症


根據ACC/AHA指南，PTMC適應症包括：

importantbox
**Class I適應症：**

- 有症狀(NYHA II-IV)的中重度MS (MVA $\leq$ 1.5 cm$^2$)
- 瓣膜型態適合(favorable valve morphology)
- 無左心房血栓
- 無中重度以上mitral regurgitation


importantbox


### 禁忌症


| p{10.5cm}}  **禁忌症類型** | **內容** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **禁忌症類型** | **內容** |  |
| 絕對禁忌症 | 左心房血栓(特別是位於左心房本體者)     中重度mitral regurgitation (MR $\geq$ 3+)     無commissural fusion的MS |  |
| 相對禁忌症 | Wilkins score $>$ 11     嚴重瓣葉鈣化(特別是commissural calcification)     嚴重subvalvular disease     合併需手術處理的其他瓣膜疾病或冠狀動脈疾病 |  |


### 術前準備


#### 影像學檢查


- Transthoracic echocardiography (TTE)：評估瓣膜型態、MVA、MR程度
- Transesophageal echocardiography (TEE)：排除左心房血栓(mandatory)
- 必要時：CT或MRI評估解剖結構


#### 實驗室檢查


- Complete blood count
- Coagulation profile (PT, aPTT, INR)
- Renal function (BUN, Creatinine)
- Electrolytes
- Thyroid function (TSH)


#### 抗凝血處理


- 心房顫動病患：術前Warfarin使用至少6週
- 術前停用Warfarin，INR $<$ 1.5方可進行手術
- 術中使用Heparin維持ACT 250-350秒


## Inoue氣球選擇與大小計算


### Inoue氣球特性


Inoue balloon catheter (Toray Industries, Japan)為12F polyvinyl chloride管，具有以下特性：


- 三段式順應性設計：遠端、中段(腰部)、近端
- 充氣時遠端先膨脹，接著近端，最後中段
- 中段腰部順應性最低，用於固定與擴張瓣膜
- 可於4 mm直徑範圍內調整(如26 mm catheter可調整22-26 mm)
- 安全邊際允許超過標稱直徑1 mm


### 身高為基礎的氣球大小公式 (Hung Formula)


**Reference Balloon Size (RS)公式：**
\begin{equation
RS (mm) = Height (cm){10} + 10
equation

**計算範例：**
若病患身高157 cm：
\[RS = 160{10} + 10 = 26 mm\]
(身高先四捨五入至最接近的10)
}

此公式由洪瑞松醫師於1994年發表，經驗證對第二代Inoue balloon同樣適用。研究顯示，在三個病患相關變數(身高、體重、體表面積)中，身高與最終氣球大小相關性最佳。


### Catheter選擇與初始氣球大小


根據瓣膜型態選擇適當catheter與初始氣球大小：


| p{4.5cm}p{5.5cm}}  **瓣膜狀態** | **Catheter選擇** | **初始/遞增氣球大小** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **瓣膜狀態** | **Catheter選擇** | **初始/遞增氣球大小** |
| Pliable, noncalcified | RS-matched     (如RS=25 mm選PTMC-26) | 初始：(RS-2) mm     遞增：1 mm；若懷疑MR增加則0.5 mm (high-pressure zone) |
| Calcified 及/或 severe subvalvular lesions | One size $<$ RS-matched     (如RS=25 mm選PTMC-24) | 初始：(RS-4) mm     遞增：low-pressure zone 1 mm     high-pressure zone 0.5 mm |


**Pressure Zone定義：**

- Low-pressure zone：氣球直徑 $<$ 標稱直徑2 mm
- High-pressure zone：氣球直徑在標稱直徑2 mm範圍內(球內壓力急遽上升)


### 替代方法：心臟超音波測量法


Nobuyoshi等人建議直接測量mitral annular diameter作為參考：


- 使用2D echocardiography測量最大舒張期瓣環直徑
- 選擇較小的直徑以避免瓣葉撕裂風險
- 初始充氣比最大氣球大小小2-3 mm


研究顯示此方法可獲得足夠的MVA且mitral regurgitation程度較低。


## 經房中隔穿刺技術 (Trans-septal Puncture)


經房間隔穿刺(Transseptal catheterization)是PTMC的關鍵步驟。洪瑞松醫師在超過500例PTMC經驗中，僅一例因心包填塞而中止手術。

figure
    
    [Image]
    (A) In the anteroposterior projection, the puncture site should be halfway from the distance of the catheter and the right border of the left atrium and one vertebral body height lower to the aortic valve plane (seen by inserting a pig tail catheter in the non-coronary aortic sinus). (B) In the 40° right anterior oblique projection, confirm if the needle is positioned neither close to the aortic root (too anterior) nor close to the free wall of the right atrium (too posterior). The puncture site should be 1–3cm below the midpoint of a line connecting the posterior wall of the aorta to the back wall of the right atrium. Reference: Heart 2016 Vol. 102 Issue 7 Pages 500-7. 
    


### 穿刺點選擇的重要性


經房間隔穿刺有兩大問題：

1. **心臟穿孔**：可能導致心包填塞
2. **不當穿刺位置**：可能造成Inoue balloon跨越mitral orifice的困難


### Frontal View定位法


#### Right Atrial Angiography法(Inoue modified method)


1. 於正常呼吸時執行right atrial angiography直至aorta顯影
2. 於停格影像上標記收縮期tricuspid valve上緣位置(Point T)
3. 將此點轉移至left atrial影像
4. 由Point T畫水平線至左心房右側緣(Point L$_1$)
5. 於T與L$_1$中點畫垂直線("midline")
6. 此垂直線與左心房下緣交點為Point C
7. 穿刺點(P)位於Point C上方約一個椎體高度處


#### 無Right Atrial Angiography法


當左心房輪廓在fluoroscopy下清晰可見時：

1. 以pigtail catheter尖端標記aortic valve位置(Point A)
2. Point A可替代Point T作為上方標記
3. 其餘步驟同上


### Lateral View定位法


#### Septal Flush Method


1. 當catheter/needle從superior vena cava向下退時
2. 持續經由needle flush contrast medium
3. 此動作可勾勒出right atrial側房間隔邊緣及其orientation
4. 可避免過高的穿刺點(可能導致房間隔剝離)
5. 可避免過低的穿刺點(可能導致右心房穿孔)


#### Septal Staining Method


當穿刺後無法抽出血液時，注射contrast可能顯示：

- 垂直方向染色：高位房間隔剝離
- 水平方向染色：針頭卡在增厚的肌肉型房間隔


### 30° Right Anterior Oblique (RAO) View


此投影可用於：

- 確認穿刺點距離aorta、tricuspid valve、coronary sinus的安全距離
- 評估穿刺點與mitral annulus中心(M point)的關係
- 最佳距離(P-M)約為椎體寬度的1.2倍


**應避免穿刺的位置：**

- **High atrial septum**：可能穿過fossa ovalis上方厚實肌肉壁，造成房間隔剝離
- **Low atrial septum**：可能穿刺到tricuspid valve或coronary sinus
- **Aorta**：通常無害但應避免
- **Posterior-inferior left atrial wall**：可能導致"stitching phenomenon"造成心包填塞


## PTMC操作流程


### 術前準備


    
    [Image]
    The major steps in lnuoe balloon PTMC are shown here. Upper Left: A 14F dilator traverses the intraatrial septum over a 0.025 inch spring guidewire. Upper Right: The balloon catheter is tracked around the guidewire toward the mitral valve. Center Left: The balloon catheter overlies the mitral valve. Center Right: The tip of the balloon in inflated. It will be pulled back, and with counterclockwise rotation of a steering stylet, “floated” across the mitral valve. Lower Left: The inflated balloon is across the mitral valve. The balloon is withdrawn until it engages the mitral leaflets. Lower Right: The balloon is fully inflated resulting in splitting of the fused mitral commissures. Reprinted with permission from Feldman T, Carroll JD: Cardiac catheterization, balloon angioplasty, and percutaneous valvuloplasty. In Hall JB, Schmidt GA, Wood LDH (eds): “Principles of Critical Care.” New York: McGraw-Hill, 1992, p 357. Reference: Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn 1993 Vol. 28 Issue 2 Pages 119-25. 
    


1. 病患取得informed consent
2. 於右股靜脈置入9F sheath，右股動脈置入5F sheath
3. 輕度鎮靜
4. 給予Heparin 1000 U進行right heart catheterization
5. 完成right atriography標定穿刺位置


### 經房中隔穿刺步驟


    
    [Image]
    Methods for choosing the primary puncture site. The upper end of the tricuspid valve at systole (T) is determined on a stop-frame frontal right atrial angiographic image (left panel) and translated to a stop-frame left atrial image (right panel). On the latter image, an imaginary horizontal line is drawn from Point 1 until it intersects the right lateral edge of the left atrium (L,). A vertical line is drawn at the midpoint between T and L, (the "midline"), and its intersection with the caudal edge of the left atrium is regarded as Point C. The puncture site (P) is determined on the "midline" at about a vertebral body height above Point C. When the left atrial silhouette is clearly visible under fluoroscopy, right atrial angiography may be omitted: the landmark for the upper end of the tricuspid valve (T) is substituted with the position of the aortic valve (A) marked by the tip of an arterial pigtail catheter touching the valve. An imaginary horizontal line is drawn from Point A to point L,, the site where the line intersects the right lateral edge of the lefl atrium (right panel). A vertical line (the "midline") is drawn at the midpoint between A and L,, and its intersection with the caudal edge of the left atrium is regarded as Point C. The puncture site is determined on the "midline" at a point about a vertebral body height above Point C. This primary target puncture site is memorized in relation to the vertebral bodies. Reference: Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn 1992 Vol. 26 Issue 4 Pages 275-84. 
    


1. 經右股靜脈置入0.032" J-tipped guide wire至superior vena cava
2. 沿guide wire置入7F或8F Mullins transseptal catheter
3. 移除guide wire，抽吸並沖洗catheter
4. 將Brockenbrough transseptal needle插入catheter至尖端近端2-3 mm處
5. 右手保持stopper-finger位置，避免needle前移
6. 於frontal view下，將needle指向約4點鐘方向
7. 緩慢向下(caudally)退回catheter/needle assembly
8. 當感覺到兩次"jump"(先過aortic knob，再落入fossa ovalis)
9. 確認位置後，向前推進needle穿過房間隔
10. 感覺到阻力消失或"give"時，將catheter推入左心房約2 cm
11. 完成穿刺後給予Heparin 9000 U


    
    [Image]
    Lateral fluoroscopic view showing the septal flush! stain method in a patient with a usual-size left atrium. A. As the cathetermeedle assembly is withdrawn caudally, it is flushed with contrast medium, which outlines the right atrial margin of the septum. The tip of the cathetermeedle (black arrow) is at the high anterior septum. B. The catheter needle is withdrawn to set its tip at the lower septum and the needle is advanced. C. Since the puncture is made in the thickened muscular septum, the needle is caught in the septum as demonstrated by the more horizontal septal stain. When the cathetermeedle is advanced, a “tenting” of the septum is observed. D. The needle is carefully forced through the septum. Reference: Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn 1992 Vol. 26 Issue 4 Pages 275-84. 
    


    
    [Image]
    Catheterheedle fitting exercise. After the needle is withdrawn, until its tip is concealed slightly (2-3 mm) from the catheter tip, the index finger is used as a stopper on the needle between the direction indicator and the catheter hub. This is to prevent the needle from moving forward and protruding from the catheter tip. The depth (A and B) and the angle of the stopper-finger (C) is adjusted according to the distance between the direction indicator and the catheter hub in each cathetermeedle set. Reference: Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn 1992 Vol. 26 Issue 4 Pages 275-84.
    


figure
    
    [Image]
    Left panel, a stop-frame diastolic left ventriculogram in 30" right anterior oblique view. It is used as a reference in choosing the puncture site (P) in avoiding puncture of the aorta (AO), the tricuspid valve (TV), and the coronary sinus (CS) and in determining the mitral valve-left ventricular apex orientation (M-A axis), about 60" in this case. The ventriculogram also outlines the position of the mitral orifice in relation to the vertebrae. ribs diaphragm, and diagnostic catheters to be memorized for manipulation of the balloon catheter across the mitral valve. Right panel, 30" right anterior oblique fluoroscopic view showing an appropriate distance and height of the puncture site (P) from the center of the mitral valve annulus (M). Usually the distance (PM) is about 1.2 times the vertebral width (w) and the puncture site (P) is slightly higher than the M point. See text for detailed discussions. Reference: Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn 1992 Vol. 26 Issue 4 Pages 275-84. 
    


### Inoue Balloon置入與定位


figure
    
    [Image]
    Insertion of balloon catheter in the presence of marked resistance at the groin. 1 : Guide wire is held taut by an assistant, and catheter is inserted into the vein at an angle of about 90". 2: Catheter is advanced to the posterior venous wall. 3: Catheter is then tilted back to an acute angle and advanced over the wire. (Artwork by courtesy of Dr. Kanji Inoue.) Reference: Catheterization and Cardiovascular Diagnosis 1996 Vol. 37 Issue 2 Pages 188-199. 
    


1. 經Brockenbrough sheath置入coiled-tip guidewire至左心房
2. 沿guidewire推進已slenderized的Inoue balloon catheter
3. Balloon catheter進入左心房後，退出guidewire
4. 將stylet插入balloon catheter並彎曲適當弧度
5. 充氣distal balloon使其部分膨脹
6. 逆時針旋轉stylet，使balloon指向mitral valve方向
7. 將balloon推過mitral orifice至左心室


### 跨越Mitral Valve技巧


    
    [Image]
    Fluoroscopic frontal (left) and lateral (right) views showing deep placement of balloon catheter into left atrium. A: Guide wire is gently pushed to coil in left atrium, against its roof. B:: Balloon catheter is then placed deep in left atrium over guide wire, leaving catheter tip (arrowheads) medial and posterior to rnitral orifice. Note that guide wire and catheter remain clear of atrial appendage area (open arrow). A biplane transesophageal transducer (arrows) with its cord (c), a Swan-Ganz balloon catheter in the pulmonary artery, and a pigtail catheter in the left ventricle are seen in all frames. (Fluoroscope views courtesy of Tsung 0. Cheng, M.D., from Percutaneous Balloon Valvuloplasty, Igaku-Shoin Medical Publishers Inc., New York, 1992 [16].) Reference: Catheterization and Cardiovascular Diagnosis 1996 Vol. 37 Issue 2 Pages 188-199. 
    


figure
    
    [Image]
    Manipulation of the Inoue balloon catheter. A, Advanced deep into the left ventricle. B, Pulled with the distal portion inflated. C, Inflation of the proximal portion followed by inflation of the middle waist portion of the balloon. D, Properly inflated middle portion of the balloon securely dilates commissural. Reference: Circulation 2009 Vol. 119 Issue 8 Pages e211-9. 
    


#### 標準方法(Direct Method)


    
    [Image]
    Manipulation of lnoue balloon catheter under 30" right anterior oblique view to avoid trespassing on the left atrial appendage area (open arrows) while crossing the mitral valve (top) and withdrawing the catheter to the left atrium after the inflation procedure (bottom). At all times, the balloon catheter in the left atrium is kept to the left of a reference pigtail catheter preplaced in the left ventricle. Top, 1: Catheter is placed deep in the left atrium over a coil-tipped guide to form a large loop with its tip directed medial and posterior to the mitral orifice. In lateral view (see Fig. 2), the loop is directed posterolaterally away from the appendage. 2: Spring-wire stylet (black arrow) is inserted to the tip of the balloon catheter. 3: By withdrawing the catheter and applying a counterclockwise twist to the stylet, the partially inflated balloon is directed to the mitral orifice for crossing the valve. Bottom, 1 : In removing the deflated balloon from the left ventricle after the inflation procedure, the stylet is advanced halfway into the balloon segment for better control of the catheter tip direction. 2: Balloon catheter, with its tip directed posteriorly by applying a slight clockwise twist to the stylet, is withdrawn to the left atrium. 3: Stylet is withdrawn completely for left atrial pressure measurement. For the next crossing of the mitral valve, the stylet is inserted into the tip of the balloon catheter, and the balloon is directed to the mitral orifice (see Avoiding the Left Atrial Appendage for discussion). (Reproduced from [28], with permission from the American Journal of Cardiology.) Reference: Catheterization and Cardiovascular Diagnosis 1996 Vol. 37 Issue 2 Pages 188-199. 
    


1. 部分充氣distal balloon
2. 逆時針旋轉catheter使balloon朝向anterior方向
3. 將balloon向前推進跨越mitral valve


#### 替代方法(Bounce Method)


當穿刺點過高或角度過陡時：

1. 順時針旋轉catheter
2. 使balloon "bounce off" posterior left atrial wall
3. 然後跨越mitral valve


figure
    
    [Image]
    Alternative technique for crossing the mitral valve. When the transseptal puncture is high, or when the angle between the septal puncture site and the valve orifice is very acute, direct passage of the balloon across the mitral valve may not be possible. In this instance, rather than counterclockwise rotation, the device is rotated clockwise and “bounced” off the posterior left atrial wall and then across the mitral valve. Reference: Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn 1993 Vol. 28 Issue 2 Pages 119-25. 
    


    
    [Image]
    (A) In an anterior oblique projection, slightly pull back the balloon catheter and rotate the J-shaped stylet counterclockwise, helping its tip turning anteriorly towards the mitral valve. (B) When it reaches the orifice, the balloon is moved forward across the mitral orifice and the stylet is slightly pulled back. An alternative technique for crossing the mitral orifice may be useful in very large left atrium or in unusual anatomical features. (C) After inserting the balloon catheter into the left atrium, rotate the stylet clockwise to face the balloon tip towards the posterior inferior atrial wall and (D) pull back the stylet, advancing only the balloon catheter through the mitral orifice. Reference: Heart 2016 Vol. 102 Issue 7 Pages 500-7. 
    


### Stepwise Dilatation技術


**Stepwise Dilatation原則：**

1. 從預定的初始大小開始充氣
2. 每次擴張後評估transmitral gradient與MR程度
3. 根據瓣膜型態遞增0.5-1 mm
4. 達到滿意結果或出現顯著MR時停止
5. 切勿追求過度擴張


#### 擴張步驟


1. 將balloon拉回至mitral valve level並錨定
2. 進一步充氣使balloon呈hourglass shape
3. 確認balloon位置正確(distal portion在LV，proximal portion在LA)
4. 快速完全充氣dilate瓣膜
5. 立即洩氣
6. 測量左心房壓力與gradient
7. 聽診評估MR雜音
8. 必要時以echocardiography評估MR程度與commissural splitting
9. 若結果不滿意且無顯著MR，增加balloon size重複擴張


figure
    
    [Image]
    Sequence of steps to disengage a catheter entrapped in a thick septum. 1 : Balloon catheter with stylet inserted to the tip is entrapped at the atrial septum (white arrowhead). 2: When the catheter is pushed, it does not advance forward, but turns downward. 3: Slight clockwise twist is made to the stylet to direct the catheter tip posteriorly. 4: Catheter, now aligned more or less perpendicular to the septal plane, can be effectively advanced further into the left atrium. 5: Counterclockwise twist is now made to the stylet to direct the catheter tip anteriorly. 6: Catheter is carefully withdrawn to bring its tip towards the mitral orifice (black arrowhead). Reference: Catheterization and Cardiovascular Diagnosis 1996 Vol. 37 Issue 2 Pages 188-199. 
    


### 擴張終點


- MVA增加 $\geq$ 50
- Mean transmitral gradient明顯下降
- 出現顯著MR (echo $\geq$ 2+或angiographic $\geq$ 2+)
- 對於高風險瓣膜：gradient降低至一半即可停止


    
    [Image]
    Three-dimensional echocardiography of the mitral valve with severe rheumatic mitral stenosis prior to percutaneous mitral commissurotomy (A). Same patient after percutaneous mitral commissurotomy showing that anterolateral commissure was opened (B). Reference: Heart 2016 Vol. 102 Issue 7 Pages 500-7. 
    


figure
    
    [Image]
    Two-dimensional echocardiography at the parasternal short-axis view of the mitral valve prior to percutaneous mitral commissurotomy (PMC) showing fused both commissures (A). Same patient after successful PMC, both commissures were fully split (B). Mitral regurgitation jets originating at both commissures are shown by colour Doppler flow mapping at the apical two-chamber view (C). LV, left ventricle; RV, right ventricle. Reference: Heart 2016 Vol. 102 Issue 7 Pages 500-7. 
    


## 併發症與處理


### 主要併發症


| p{3cm}p{7.5cm}}  **併發症** | **發生率** | **處理方式** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **併發症** | **發生率** | **處理方式** |
| Severe MR | 1.5--7.5 | 觀察或緊急手術(通常$<$5 |
| Cardiac tamponade | 0--2 | Pericardiocentesis或手術 |
| Stroke/Embolism | $<$ 1 | 支持性治療、抗凝血 |
| ASD creation | 4--5 | 多數無臨床意義，追蹤觀察 |
| Death | $<$ 1 | --- |


### Severe Subvalvular Disease的警示徵象


洪瑞松醫師提出以下徵象提示嚴重瓣下病變：


#### Balloon Impasse


- 即使balloon已正確對準且未充氣，仍無法通過mitral orifice至左心室
- 反映嚴重阻塞性瓣下病變
- 若強行擴張可能造成leaflet或chordae撕裂
- 處理：改用較小的PTMC-18或PTMC-20 catheter先行擴張


#### Balloon Compression Sign


- 充氣的distal balloon出現明顯凹陷
- 表示嚴重瓣下病變
- 應立即停止充氣並重新評估策略


#### Accordion Maneuver困難


- 瓣下結構阻擋導致無法執行accordion maneuver
- 若未察覺，後續充氣可能在左心室內而非mitral valve


#### Cogwheel Resistance


- 拉回部分充氣的balloon時感覺到齒輪狀阻力
- 提示瓣下病變存在


### Mitral Regurgitation處理


| p{10.5cm}}  **MR程度** | **處理建議** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **MR程度** | **處理建議** |  |
| 輕度(1+) | 臨床觀察，多數無臨床意義 |  |
| 中度(2+) | 停止擴張，藥物治療，密切追蹤 |  |
| 重度(3-4+) | 血行動力學穩定：藥物治療(Nitroprusside)     血行動力學不穩定：緊急手術 |  |


**MR機轉與預後：**

- Commissural split所致MR：預後較佳，MV replacement率較低
- Non-commissural MR (leaflet tear, chordal rupture)：預後較差


    
    [Image]
    Two-dimensional echocardiography at the parasternal short-axis view of the mitral valve before (A) and after percutaneous mitral commissurotomy (B and C). After the procedure, an excessive opening of the mitral valve occurred with no recognisable structural abnormalities of the valve (B). Significant mitral regurgitation is shown by colour Doppler flow mapping at the apical four-chamber view (C). LV, left ventricle; RA, right atrium; RV, right ventricle. Reference: Heart 2016 Vol. 102 Issue 7 Pages 500-7. 
    


    
    [Image]
    Two-dimensional echocardiography at the parasternal short-axis view before (A) and after percutaneous mitral commissurotomy (B). A new echocardiographic dropout (B, arrow) at the anterior mitral leaflet was seen as a result of leaflet tearing after the procedure. Transesophageal echocardiography confirmed the leaflet tearing (C, arrow) with significant mitral regurgitation (D). LA, left atrium; LV, left ventricle; RA, right atrium; RV, right ventricle. Reference: Heart 2016 Vol. 102 Issue 7 Pages 500-7.
    


## 長期追蹤與預後


### 立即術後結果評估


成功定義(多數研究)：

- MVA增加 $\geq$ 50
- 無severe MR ($\leq$ 2+/4+)


### 長期追蹤


| p{10.5cm}}  **追蹤項目** | **建議** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **追蹤項目** | **建議** |  |
| 門診追蹤 | 術後1個月，之後每3-6個月 |  |
| Echocardiography | 評估MVA、MR程度、pulmonary pressure |  |
| 症狀評估 | NYHA functional class |  |
| 抗凝血治療 | Atrial fibrillation病患持續warfarin |  |


### Restenosis


#### 定義


- MVA $<$ 1.5 cm$^2$，或
- 喪失初始增益的50


#### Restenosis-free率


根據長期追蹤研究：

- 5年：85
- 10年：70
- 15年：44
- 瓣膜型態良好者：5年92


#### Repeat PTMC


- 若restenosis主要因commissural refusion所致，repeat PTMC為首選
- 若為瓣膜僵硬或瓣下結構退化所致，可能不適合repeat PTMC
- 研究顯示repeat PTMC與initial PTMC之immediate及long-term results相似


### 長期預後預測因子


根據多變量分析，影響長期event-free survival的因子：


| p{8.5cm}}  **預測因子** | **說明** |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **預測因子** | **說明** |  |
| 年齡 | 年齡越大預後越差 |  |
| 術後MR程度 | Severe MR與較差預後相關 |  |
| 術後mean gradient | 較高gradient與較差預後相關 |  |
| 術後pulmonary artery pressure | 較高壓力與較差預後相關 |  |
| 即刻手術結果 | Suboptimal result與較差event-free survival相關 |  |


**重要發現：**瓣膜型態(Wilkins score)雖可預測手術結果，但在校正術後血行動力學數據後，並非獨立的長期預後預測因子。


## 特殊情況處理


### 左心房血栓


- 左心房本體血栓為絕對禁忌症
- 左心耳(LAA)小型固定血栓：於TEE持續監測下，由經驗豐富者執行可能可接受
- 術前warfarin治療至少6週可減少血栓


### 懷孕


- 懷孕前：建議於懷孕前對severe MS進行PTMC
- 懷孕中：適應症為藥物治療無效的NYHA III-IV
- 最佳時機：妊娠20週後
- 需注意胎兒輻射暴露


### 嚴重脊柱側彎(Kyphoscoliosis)


洪瑞松醫師報告於severe kyphoscoliosis病患成功執行PTMC的經驗：


- 傳統認為transseptal catheterization為禁忌
- 使用biplane right atrial angiography可清楚顯示扭曲的解剖結構
- Septal flush method對標定穿刺點非常有幫助
- 需特別注意心臟結構的相對位置改變


    
    [Image]
    [Image]
    Severe kyphosis. Reference: Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn 1993 Vol. 30 Issue 1 Pages 40-4. 
    


### Atrial Septal Aneurysm (ASA)


- ASA與MS合併存在非常罕見
- 穿刺點應選在ASA的cephalid及dorsal位置
- Biplane right atrial angiography可清楚顯示ASA與atria的解剖關係


    
    [Image]
    Atrial septal aneurysm. Reference: Am Heart J 1993 Vol. 126 Issue 2 Pages 474-5. 
    


### Giant Left Atrium


- 房間隔orientation可能明顯改變
- 需執行biplane right atrial angiography
- 穿刺點可能需要更為caudal
- M-A axis (mitral valve-left ventricular apex orientation)更趨水平


## 文獻回顧：洪瑞松醫師相關發表


以下整理洪瑞松醫師(Jui-Sung Hung, MD)於PTMC領域的重要貢獻：


| p{5cm}p{8.5cm}}  **年份** | **文章標題** | **主要貢獻** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **年份** | **文章標題** | **主要貢獻** |
| 1992 | Atrial Septal Puncture Technique in PTMC | 詳細描述PTMC的transseptal puncture技術，包含landmark selection、避免不當穿刺點的方法、step-by-step操作流程 |
| 1993 | PTMC in Patients With Severe Kyphoscoliosis | 首次報告在severe kyphoscoliosis病患執行PTMC的經驗，證實biplane right atrial angiography與septal flush method的重要性 |
| 1993 | Transseptal Balloon Mitral Valvuloplasty in MS with ASA | 報告在合併atrial septal aneurysm的MS病患成功執行PTMC |
| 1994 | A Simple Balloon-Sizing Method in Inoue-Balloon PTMC | 發表以身高為基礎的氣球大小公式：RS = Height/10 + 10，驗證此公式對第二代Inoue balloon同樣適用 |
| 1995 | "Balloon Impasse": A Marker for Severe Mitral Subvalvular Disease | 描述balloon impasse作為severe subvalvular disease的標記，可預測PTMC後MR風險 |
| 1996 | Pitfalls and Tips in Inoue Balloon Mitral Commissurotomy | 綜合超過1,000例經驗，詳述PTMC的常見陷阱與技術要點 |
| 1996 | BMV in Moderate Mitral Regurgitation | 評估合併moderate MR病患接受PTMC的可行性與安全性 |


### 主要貢獻摘要


#### Transseptal Puncture技術標準化


洪瑞松醫師於1992年發表的文章詳細描述了PTMC專用的transseptal puncture技術，強調：

- Right atrial angiography的重要性
- "Midline"概念的建立
- Septal flush與staining method的應用
- 30° RAO view在確認穿刺安全性的角色


#### Balloon Sizing公式


1994年發表的研究中，分析了59位pliable noncalcified valve病患的數據，發現：

- 身高與最終氣球大小相關性最佳(優於體重與體表面積)
- 身高為常數，不受體液狀態影響
- 公式簡單易記且臨床實用


#### Balloon Impasse概念


1995年首次描述的"balloon impasse"徵象：

- 定義：即使未充氣的balloon也無法通過mitral valve至左心室
- 意義：反映severe obstructive subvalvular lesions
- 處理：使用smaller PTMC-18或PTMC-20 catheter先行predilation
- 若強行使用標準大小catheter可能造成severe MR


#### Stepwise Dilatation技術精進


洪瑞松醫師強調的stepwise dilatation原則：

- 從保守的初始大小開始
- 根據瓣膜型態調整遞增幅度
- High-pressure zone更需謹慎(0.5 mm increments)
- Calcified valve或severe subvalvular disease：gradient降低一半即可停止


## 總結與建議


### PTMC成功要素


1. **適當的病患選擇**      - 詳細的echocardiographic評估 - 使用Wilkins score或newer scoring systems - 排除禁忌症(特別是LAA血栓與significant MR)
2. **安全的Transseptal Puncture**      - 使用appropriate landmarks (right atrial angiography或alternative method) - Septal flush method確認穿刺方向 - 30° RAO view確認安全性
3. **正確的Balloon Sizing**      - 使用身高公式計算Reference Size - 根據瓣膜型態選擇適當catheter與初始大小 - 採用stepwise dilatation technique
4. **謹慎的Dilatation過程**      - 每次擴張後評估結果 - 注意MR增加的徵象 - 識別severe subvalvular disease的warning signs
5. **完善的長期追蹤**      - 定期echocardiographic監測 - 適當的抗凝血治療 - Restenosis的早期識別與處理


importantbox
**Take-Home Messages:**

1. PTMC是適合病患的首選治療，成功率$>$90
2. Transseptal puncture是PTMC成功的關鍵步驟
3. 身高公式(RS = H/10 + 10)是簡單有效的balloon sizing方法
4. Stepwise dilatation可最大化MVA增益並最小化MR風險
5. 識別severe subvalvular disease的warning signs可避免catastrophic MR
6. 長期預後主要取決於immediate procedural result


importantbox


## 參考文獻


1. Hung JS. Atrial septal puncture technique in percutaneous transvenous mitral commissurotomy: Mitral valvuloplasty using the Inoue balloon catheter technique. [*Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn](https://doi.org/10.1002/ccd.1810260407). 1992;26:275-284.*
2. Ramasamy D, Zambahari R, Fu M, Yeh KH, Hung JS. Percutaneous transvenous mitral commissurotomy in patients with severe kyphoscoliosis. [*Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn](https://doi.org/10.1002/ccd.1810300111). 1993;30:40-44.*
3. Yeh KH, Fu M, Wu CJ, Chua S, Chen YC, Hung JS. Transseptal balloon mitral valvuloplasty in mitral stenosis with atrial septal aneurysm. [*Am Heart J](https://doi.org/10.1016/0002-8703(93)90686-4). 1993;126:474-475.*
4. Lau KW, Hung JS. A simple balloon-sizing method in Inoue-balloon percutaneous transvenous mitral commissurotomy. [*Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn](https://doi.org/10.1002/ccd.1810330207). 1994;33:120-129.*
5. Lau KW, Hung JS. "Balloon impasse:" A marker for severe mitral subvalvular disease and a predictor of mitral regurgitation in Inoue-balloon percutaneous transvenous mitral commissurotomy. [*Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn](https://doi.org/10.1002/ccd.1810350308). 1995;35:310-319.*
6. Hung JS, Lau KW. Pitfalls and tips in Inoue balloon mitral commissurotomy. [*Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn](https://doi.org/10.1002/(SICI)1097-0304(199602)37:2<188::AID-CCD19>3.0.CO;2-G). 1996;37:188-199.*
7. Lau KW, Ding ZP, Hung JS. Inoue-balloon mitral valvuloplasty in patients with moderate mitral regurgitation. [*Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn](https://doi.org/10.1002/(SICI)1097-0304(199605)38:1<1::AID-CCD1>3.0.CO;2-E). 1996;38:1-7.*
8. Inoue K, Feldman T. Percutaneous transvenous mitral commissurotomy using the Inoue balloon catheter. [*Cathet Cardiovasc Diagn](https://doi.org/10.1002/ccd.1810280206). 1993;28:119-125.*
9. Nobuyoshi M, Arita T, Shirai S, et al. Percutaneous balloon mitral valvuloplasty: A review. [*Circulation](https://doi.org/10.1161/CIRCULATIONAHA.108.792952). 2009;119:e211-e219.*
10. Nunes MCP, Tan TC, Nascimento BR, et al. Prediction of outcome after percutaneous mitral valvuloplasty. [*Circulation](https://doi.org/10.1161/CIRCULATIONAHA.113.006144). 2014;129:886-895.*
11. Nunes MCP, Nascimento BR, Toscano TC, et al. Percutaneous mitral balloon commissurotomy for rheumatic mitral stenosis. [*Heart](https://doi.org/10.1136/heartjnl-2015-308091). 2016;102:500-507.*
12. Taştan A, Küp A, Çam N. Two different Inoue balloon sizing methods for mitral balloon valvuloplasty: comparison of the height-based and the echocardiographic methods. [*Cardiovasc J Afr](https://doi.org/10.5830/CVJA-2015-087). 2016;27:148-152.*
13. Unal Aksu H, Kaçmaz F, Karaca Ö, et al. Dual source computed tomography versus echocardiography for mitral valve evaluation in patients with rheumatic mitral stenosis. [*Echocardiography](https://doi.org/10.1111/echo.13076). 2016;33:346-352.*
14. Gordon SP, Douglas PS, Come PC, Manning WJ. Two-dimensional and Doppler echocardiographic determinants of the natural history of mitral valve narrowing in patients with rheumatic mitral stenosis. [*J Am Coll Cardiol](https://doi.org/10.1016/0735-1097(92)90115-4). 1992;19:968-973.*
